name: solo-system-rpg
description: Project-specific Codex plugin for Solo System RPG development.

interface.shortDescription: Project memory, architecture, design, Telegram, and Supabase guidance.
interface.longDescription: A local project plugin that teaches Codex how to work on Solo System RPG using the Obsidian vault as source of truth.
defaultPrompt: Read the Solo System vault and prepare the next build task.
Design a mobile Telegram Mini App screen from the vault rules.
Plan Supabase schema and RLS for the current milestone.
